title: helianthus × kellermanii
intro: Helianthus × kellermanii, also known as the Kellerman's sunflower, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to be used as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic agent due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Helianthus × kellermanii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and infections.
